# The Fridge Repair

[www.thefridgerepair.com](https://www.thefridgerepair.com/)

The Fridge Repair is a South Florida refrigerator repair landing page built for fast mobile conversions and clear local service messaging. The site is focused on helping homeowners and businesses quickly request help for cooling issues, leaks, frost buildup, ice maker problems, and other refrigerator-related service needs.

## What We Do

The Fridge Repair is designed to connect customers with fast refrigerator service across:

- Miami
- Broward County
- Palm Beach County

The experience is intentionally simple:

- clear mobile-first layout
- fast tap-to-call actions
- same day or next day service messaging
- major refrigerator brands listed clearly
- quick lead form for callback requests

## Service Focus

We position the business around:

- fast response times
- straightforward communication
- mobile-friendly booking
- support for major refrigerator brands
- local coverage from Miami up to Jupiter

## Website Notes

This repository contains the static GitHub Pages website for The Fridge Repair, including:

- the main landing page
- branding assets and icons
- SEO files and keyword planning
- GitHub Pages deployment workflow
- a starter Google Apps Script lead handler in `apps-script/lead-handler.gs`

## Lead Handling

The `apps-script/lead-handler.gs` file is kept in this repository as a starter script for Google Apps Script deployment. It can be copied into your Google Apps Script project later when you are ready to connect the live form submission flow.
